limitations: R&D figures of $3.1B are total company R&D, not AI-attributable in isolation; AI is cited as a focus but no AI-specific R&D dollar split is disclosed, limiting investment intensity precision.

AI-optimized server revenue growth is described qualitatively and as a driver of 19% ISG revenue increase, but no standalone AI revenue figure is provided, capping narrative concreteness at 4 rather than 5.

Risk section is present and detailed; risk score of 4 reflects named company-specific mechanisms (reputational harm, IP/copyright exposure, regulatory compliance costs, cybersecurity via AI tools) but no quantified risk exposure or named governance body is disclosed, precluding a score of 5.
